title: Recent Rebound In Chinese Steel Production
section_path: Recent Rebound In Chinese Steel Production
section_path_text: Recent Rebound In Chinese Steel Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
The most recently released data shows that daily crude steel production at large and medium-sized mills in China averaged 2.03 million tons during October 1 - October 10. This is up by 7% from late September and is down year-on-year by only 1%. As we have been highlighting in Commodore Research's Weekly China Reports and Weekly Executive Reports, year-on-year growth in China's steel production returned in late July.
